outcomes.title: Diff Quot
outcomes.description: Evaluate and simplify the difference quotient.
outcomes.template:
Evaluate the difference quotient, \displaystyle{ \frac{f(x+h)-f(x)}{h}} , for {{f_tex}}.

SOLUTION

f(x+h) = {{step1_sub}}

= {{step2_expand}}

= {{step3_dist}}

\displaystyle{\frac{f(x+h)-f(x)}{h} = \frac{ {{step4_num_setup}} }{h}}

=\displaystyle{ \frac{ {{step5_num_simp}} }{h}}

= \displaystyle{ \frac{ {{step6_factor}} }{h}}

\boxed{ {{final_ans}} }
